privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating two collections in Nuxeo: 'Finance Resources' and 'Strategy Resources'. Document assignments: 'Annual Report 2023' must be in 'Finance Resources' only. 'Project Proposal' must be in 'Strategy Resources' only. 'Q3 Status Report' must be in BOTH 'Finance Resources' and 'Strategy Resources'.
